rows.question: Which wildlife sanctuary is located in the town in which the Hollis/Brookline High School services?
rows.raw: ANSWER: La Beaver Brook Association (Hollis, New Hampshire) — non il Talbot-Taylor, che si trova a Bedford, NH.

rows.question: Which wildlife sanctuary is located in the town in which the Hollis/Brookline High School services?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Talbot-Taylor Wildlife Sanctuary

rows.raw: ANSWER: Per Om Shanti Om (dove Kirron Kher era supporting) Deepika Padukone non vinse Best Actress ma il Filmfare Award for Best Female Debut (2008).

rows.question: What award did Deepika Pedukone win for the film where Kirron Kher had a supporting role?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Non vinse il Best Actress (fu solo nominata): per "Om Shanti Om" Deepika Padukone vinse il Filmfare Award for Best Female Debut.

rows.question: Mexican Claudia Rivas represents her country in competitions including the Pan-American Games. What kind of athlete is she?
rows.raw: ANSWER: È una triatleta — Claudia Rivas rappresenta il Messico nel triathlon (Giochi Panamericani, Olimpiadi), non nella corsa.

rows.question: Mexican Claudia Rivas represents her country in competitions including the Pan-American Games. What kind of athlete is she?
rows.raw: ANSWER: È una triatleta (triathlete), non una runner — Claudia Rivas Vega rappresenta il Messico nel triathlon, inclusi i Pan-American Games.

rows.question: The Man with the Iron Fists is a 2012 American martial arts film directed by RZA, the film stars RZA, and which actor, film producer and musician, and although a New Zealand citizen, he has lived most of his life in Australia?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Russell Crowe (non Mel Gibson — il co-protagonista neozelandese cresciuto in Australia è Russell Crowe)

rows.question: The Man with the Iron Fists is a 2012 American martial arts film directed by RZA, the film stars RZA, and which actor, film producer and musician, and although a New Zealand citizen, he has lived most of his life in Australia?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Russell Crowe (non Mel Gibson — Gibson non è nel cast)

rows.question: Which American worldwide automotive industry components and parts supplier had a division that manufactured the Norge brand of appliances?

rows.question: In what year was the last novel of the author who wrote Revolutionary Road published?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 1986 — l'ultimo romanzo di Richard Yates (autore di Revolutionary Road) è Cold Spring Harbor (1986), non 1976 (The Easter Parade è del 1976 ma non è l'ultimo).

rows.question: In what year was the last novel of the author who wrote Revolutionary Road published?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 1986 — l'autore di Revolutionary Road è Richard Yates, e il suo ultimo romanzo, Cold Spring Harbor, fu pubblicato nel 1986 (come indicato dalla memoria [1]), non nel 1976.

rows.question: The O'Hara Watercolor School was burned down during fires that killed how many people?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Non verificato — non ho evidenza indipendente che confermi né la distruzione della scuola né il numero di 15 vittime; non posso confermare il dato solo perché è nella premessa.

rows.question: The O'Hara Watercolor School was burned down during fires that killed how many people?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 16

rows.question: Are the magazines, Nat Mags and Plaza Kvinna published in the same country?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Nat Mags (National Magazine Company) è pubblicata nel Regno Unito, Plaza Kvinna in Svezia: paesi diversi (ma stesso continente, l'Europa).

rows.question: Are the magazines, Nat Mags and Plaza Kvinna published in the same country?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Nat Mags è pubblicata nel Regno Unito (Londra) e Plaza Kvinna in Svezia (Stoccolma): paesi diversi, ma stesso continente (Europa), non continenti diversi.

rows.question: Who wrote Doomquest which establishes Doctor Doom as a member of his rogues gallery?
rows.raw: ANSWER: David Michelinie e Bob Layton (con disegni di John Romita Jr.), non Stan Lee e Jack Kirby.

rows.question: Did both Pekka Karjalainen and John Ince work as a film director?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Sì, entrambi — John Ince (1878–1947, fratello di Thomas e Ralph Ince) fu attore e regista cinematografico americano, quindi la tua premessa è errata.

rows.question: Did both Pekka Karjalainen and John Ince work as a film director?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Sì — entrambi: Pekka Karjalainen era regista finlandese e John Ince era anch'egli regista cinematografico (oltre che attore), quindi la tua premessa è errata.

rows.question: one of the stars of Sioux City Sue was the voice actor for which movie
rows.raw:
ANSWER: Winnie the Pooh — la premessa è errata: la star di Sioux City Sue era Sterling Holloway, voce di Winnie the Pooh (non di Transylvania 6-5000, doppiato da Mel Blanc).

Sources: [Wikipedia – Sioux City Sue](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sioux_City_Sue_(film)), [IMDb](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt0038946/)

rows.question: one of the stars of Sioux City Sue was the voice actor for which movie
rows.raw: ANSWER: Winnie the Pooh (Sterling Holloway, star di Sioux City Sue, fu la voce originale del titolo in Walt Disney's Winnie the Pooh — non Transylvania 6-5000)
